found the first, the second switch\r

you’ve got at least two Pokémon.

Til: All right, I’m bringing out
a Pokémon.\f
HGSS.718.0765:
Til: Even though Tori tried very hard
for me, we still lost...
HGSS.718.0766:
Til: We can’t battle you if you’ve only
got one Pokémon...
HGSS.718.0767:
Fly high into the sky, my beloved
bird Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.0768: I feel like just flying away now.
HGSS.718.0769:
I plan to train in Cianwood City to teach
my Pokémon how to Fly.
HGSS.718.0770:
Hey, are you good at Pokémon?\f
If you’re really good, I want you to
teach me some things.\f
HGSS.718.0771: I see. So you can battle that way.
HGSS.718.0772:
I know something good!\f
Moomoo Farm’s milk is famous for
its taste.
HGSS.718.0773:
Oh, here you are again!
There’s so many more things I want to\r
learn from you!\f
HGSS.718.0774:
I’ve been overseas, so I know about all
sorts of Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.0776:
All kinds of people around the world live
happily with Pokémon.
HGSS.718.0777: Let me try something I learned today.\f
HGSS.718.0778: I didn’t study enough, I guess.
HGSS.718.0779:
I have to take so many tests, I don’t
have much time for Pokémon.\f
So when I do get to battle, I really
concentrate.
HGSS.718.0780:
You’ve come to the right place!\f
Time for me to try out everything I’ve
learned today!\f
HGSS.718.0781:
Hi! Aren’t you a cute Trainer!
May I see your Pokémon?\f
HGSS.718.0782: I’m glad I got to see your Pokémon!
HGSS.718.0783:
When I see Pokémon, it seems to soothe
my nerves.
HGSS.718.0784:
Let me see what your Pokémon are
capable of.\f
HGSS.718.0786:
You know how Pokémon have
different abilities?\f
People are like that, too. Everyone has
different potential.
HGSS.718.0787: Is it OK to brag about my Pokémon?\f
HGSS.718.0789:
I’m not listening to your bragging!
We Pokéfans have a policy of not\r
listening to other people brag!
HGSS.718.0790:
I’ve been waiting!
I’ve been wanting to brag to you!\f
HGSS.718.0791:
Such darling Pokémon. Let’s show our
Pokémon together at the same time.\f
HGSS.718.0793:
Do you know about baby Pokémon?
I’ll bet they’re just adorable!
HGSS.718.0794:
I just got back to Olivine.
So, how about a Pokémon battle?\f
HGSS.718.0796:
My Pokémon were caught and raised
overseas. They’re my companions on\r
those long voyages.
HGSS.718.0797:
You have to warm up before going into
the water.\f
That’s basic.\f
HGSS.718.0799:
Cianwood City is a good distance away
from here.
HGSS.718.0800:
Hey, you’re young and fit!
Don’t ride your Pokémon! Swim!\f
HGSS.718.0802:
Swimming exercises your entire body.
It’s healthy.
HGSS.718.0803:
Are you going to Cianwood?\f
How about a quick battle first?\f
HGSS.718.0805:
I’d say I’m a better swimmer than you.
Yeah!
HGSS.718.0806:
No inflatable tube for me.
I’m hanging on to a sea Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.0808:
While I float like this, the waves carry
me along.
HGSS.718.0809:
The water’s warm here. I’m loose and
limber. Sure, I’ll take you on!\f
HGSS.718.0811:
Isn’t it relaxing, just floating
like this?
HGSS.718.0812:
I’m a bit tired. If I win, lend me your
Pokémon.\f
HGSS.718.0814:
It’s so far to Cianwood. But it’s no
easy return trip to Olivine either.\r
What should I do?
HGSS.718.0815:
See those islands that are blocked
by whirlpools?\r
There just has to be a secret!\f
HGSS.718.0816: What’s the secret to your strength?
HGSS.718.0817:
It was a dark and stormy night...\f
I saw this giant Pokémon flying from
the Whirl Islands.\f
Feathers were scattering from its
silver wings.
HGSS.718.0818:
The waves are wild here.
They tire you out as you swim.\f
HGSS.718.0820:
The currents keep me from reaching
that island.
HGSS.718.0821:
Are you seeking the secrets of the
Whirl Islands?\f
HGSS.718.0823:
A secret about the Whirl Islands...
It’s pitch black inside!
HGSS.718.0824:
I’m on my way to the Whirl Islands.
I’m going exploring with friends.\f
HGSS.718.0825: Is that how you do it?
HGSS.718.0826:
There’s supposed to be a big Pokémon
deep beneath the Whirl Islands.\r
I wonder what it could be?
HGSS.718.0827:
You look so elegant riding
your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.718.0829:
Wasn’t there a hit song about a boy
riding a LAPRAS?
HGSS.718.0830:
The weather is so beautiful, I’m in
a daze!\f
HGSS.718.0832:
A sunburn is the worst for skin.\f
But I don’t use sunblock.
I won’t pollute the water.
HGSS.718.0833:
If you need to rest, just tread water.
You’ll get your breath back so you can\r
keep on going strong.\f
HGSS.718.0834: Oh! You have more energy than I do.
HGSS.718.0835:
I heard roars from deep inside
the islands.
HGSS.718.0836:
At night, STARYU gather near the
water’s surface.\f
HGSS.718.0838:
The clusters of STARYU light up at the
same time. It’s so beautiful,\r
it’s scary.
HGSS.718.0839:
Let me demonstrate the power of the
Pokémon I caught!\f
HGSS.718.0841:
I want to become the Trainer Champ
using the Pokémon I caught.\r
That’s the best part of fishing!
HGSS.718.0842:
Me? I haven’t been waiting at all.
I didn’t know that fishing would be\r
so boring!\f
HGSS.718.0843:
Hey!\f
This is my secret place!
Get lost, you outsider!\f
HGSS.718.0844: I should have used my Moon Stone...
HGSS.718.0845:
You’re working on a Pokédex?\f
Wow, you must know some pretty
rare Pokémon!\r
May I please see it? Please?
HGSS.718.0846:
What’s the other side of Mt. Mortar
like, do you know?\f
If you can beat me, I’ll let you know.\f
HGSS.718.0848:
I said a pretty boastful lie. I’m sorry!\f
There’s this huge waterfall in the way,
so I’ve never been on the other side of\r
Mt. Mortar!
HGSS.718.0849:
I can do so much with my Pokémon!
It’s super fun!\f
HGSS.718.0851:
What is going on at Lake of Rage?
We were planning to camp there.
HGSS.718.0852:
I’m in a slump.\f
Maybe it’s the gear I’m using.
Let’s battle for a change of pace!\f
HGSS.718.0853: I lost, but I feel better anyway.
HGSS.718.0854:
Kurt’s Lure Ball is the best for
catching hooked Pokémon.\f
It’s much more effective than an
Ultra Ball.
HGSS.718.0855:
I love Pokémon!\f
That’s why I started--and why I’ll keep
on collecting Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.0856: How could you do this to me?
HGSS.718.0857:
What else do I like besides Pokémon?\f
Mary, on the radio. I bet she’s cute!
HGSS.718.0858: Hey! Do you have any rare Pokémon?\f
HGSS.718.0860:
I’d be happy just to own a single
rare Pokémon.
HGSS.718.0861:
I’ve been waiting!
Did you bring any rare Pokémon\r
with you?\f
HGSS.718.0862:
Would you get this?\f
Some red-haired kid made fun of my
precious Pokémon!\f
Humph! My Pokémon’s great!\f
HGSS.718.0864:
It’s OK for people to like different
types of Pokémon.\f
Pokémon isn’t just about having the
most powerful one.
HGSS.718.0865:
Are you going to Lake of Rage, too?
Let’s play for a little while!\f
HGSS.718.0867:
I’m having a picnic with Pokémon.
Won’t you join us?
HGSS.718.0869:
Do you know about the legendary
bird Pokémon?\f
HGSS.718.0871:
ARTICUNO, ZAPDOS, and MOLTRES are the
three legendary bird Pokémon.\f
I heard there are other legendary
birds, though.
HGSS.718.0872:
How has it been?
Did you see the legendary Pokémon?\f
HGSS.718.0873:
I can tell you’re a good Trainer by
looking at you.\f
I’m good at Pokémon, and I can see that
you are, too.\f
HGSS.718.0874: Tch! It’s a total loss on my part.
HGSS.718.0875:
Wow. You have a lot of Badges.
No wonder you’re so tough.\f
I wonder if Ecruteak Gym’s Morty is
still in training?\r
He really hammered me.
HGSS.718.0876:
You look strong.\f
Good Trainers seek tough opponents
instinctively.\f
HGSS.718.0877: Nope! This won’t do at all.
HGSS.718.0878:
We all get better by experiencing many
battles. I battled a lot to become what\r
I am today--an elite.
HGSS.718.0881:
It’s important to have conviction on
your side.
HGSS.718.0882:
Aack! You made me lose a POLIWAG!
What are you going to do about it?\f
HGSS.718.0884:
That POLIWAG that got away...
It was huge.\f
I swear it must’ve been 82 feet long!
HGSS.718.0885:
Hey! I’ve been waiting for you!\f
...Oops, maybe I shouldn’t yell so loud.
The POLIWAG ran away...\f
HGSS.718.0886:
I fish until I can’t anymore.
I also battle until I drop.\r
That’s my relationship with my Pokémon.\f
HGSS.718.0888:
That’s 100 wins to 101 losses.\f
I won’t battle again for a while.
HGSS.718.0889:
I’ll do anything to get my hands on
rare Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.0890: Oooh, your Pokémon are so appealing.
HGSS.718.0891:
If a Pokémon has different colors than
usual, it’s more valuable.\f
What? You mean that’s not true?
HGSS.718.0892:
What is your battle strategy?
It is foolish to use strong moves\r
indiscriminately.\f
HGSS.718.0894:
I’m not for overly powerful moves.\f
I want to win, but I also don’t want to
harm Pokémon.
HGSS.718.0895:
What are your thoughts on
raising Pokémon?\f
HGSS.718.0897:
I see you’re raising your Pokémon
with care.\f
The bond you build will save you in
tough situations.
HGSS.718.0898:
I was training here alone.
Behold the result of my hard work!\f
HGSS.718.0900:
This calls for extreme measures. I must
take to the hills and train in solitude.
HGSS.718.0901:
I’ve been studying while waiting for you
to come back...\f
Let me show you the results!\f
HGSS.718.0902:
Be prepared for anything!\r
Let me see if your Pokémon have been
raised properly!\f
HGSS.718.0904:
I’ll head back to Blackthorn’s Ice Path
and train some more.
HGSS.718.0905:
Yo! You’re tough! But you know what?
When it comes to sheer toughness,\r
I’m the man!\f
HGSS.718.0907:
Boy, do I love HP Up! Mmmm, yum!\f
I keep drinking my Pokémon’s!
I can’t help it!
HGSS.718.0910:
I’m not much good at thinking, see?
So I just plow ahead with power!
HGSS.718.0912:
Why do I climb mountains?
Because they’re there.\f
Why do I train Pokémon?
Because they’re there!\f
HGSS.718.0914:
The best thing ever to happen to me was
discovering Pokémon.
HGSS.718.0915:
I’m raising Pokémon, too!
Will you battle with me?\f
HGSS.718.0917:
I did my best but came up short.
No excuses--I admit I lost.
HGSS.718.0918:
Awright! I’ll show you the power of
mountain Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.0919: Mercy! You showed me your power!
HGSS.718.0920:
It’s over. I don’t mind. We Hikers are
like that.
HGSS.718.0921:
I raise Pokémon, too!
Will you battle with me?\f
HGSS.718.0923:
If you’ve promised to have a rematch,
your opponent’s location will be marked\r
with an “!” on the map.\f
You can check it on your Pokégear.
HGSS.718.0924:
Hey, have you gone and visited many
Gyms since then?\f
HGSS.718.0926: Oh, so close! I almost had you.
HGSS.718.0927: I don’t have any Pokémon left...
HGSS.718.0929: Ooh, you’re good at Pokémon, too.
HGSS.718.0931:
If a Trainer spots another Trainer,
he or she has to make a challenge.\r
That is our destiny.\f
HGSS.718.0933:
Pokémon and their Trainer become
powerful through constant battling.
HGSS.718.0934:
The red GYARADOS?
That sounds scary.\r
It must be red with rage!\r
Me?\f
I’m not angry or anything, but
let’s battle!\f
HGSS.718.0936:
Come to think of it, I’ve seen a
pink BUTTERFREE.
HGSS.718.0937:
Let me battle with the Pokémon
I just caught!\f
HGSS.718.0938:
I might be an expert angler, but I stink
as a Pokémon Trainer...
HGSS.718.0939:
I won’t lose as an angler! I catch
Pokémon all day.
HGSS.718.0940:
No matter what I do, all I catch are
the same Pokémon...\f
HGSS.718.0942: Why can’t I catch any good Pokémon?
HGSS.718.0943:
Are you alone?
Then let’s battle!\f
HGSS.718.0945:
I wonder if there are any mountains
worth climbing in Kanto?
HGSS.718.0946:
I’m going to Kanto to put on
fire-breathing shows!\f
HGSS.718.0948:
I guess fire is weak on the sea...
It doesn’t matter? Really?
HGSS.718.0949: Hey, kid! Want to battle with me?\f
HGSS.718.0951:
You’re traveling all alone?
Isn’t your mom worried?
HGSS.718.0952:
You think I’m a baby?
That’s not fair!\f
HGSS.718.0954: Baby is a rude name to call someone!
HGSS.718.0955:
You’ve got only one Pokémon?
Then I’m not battling with you.
HGSS.718.0956:
I’m not a baby!
That’s not a nice thing to say!\f
HGSS.718.0958:
Sometimes, kids are smarter
than grown-ups!
HGSS.718.0959:
If you don’t bring more Pokémon, then
you can’t play with everyone.
HGSS.718.0962:
No more ships for me. Next time, I’m
taking the Magnet Train.
HGSS.718.0963:
Nothing beats a battle when I’m on
my break.\f
HGSS.718.0964: Win or lose, my break’s over!
HGSS.718.0965:
I guess I can’t win if I don’t
get serious.
HGSS.718.0966:
I’m so bored.
Want to battle?\f
HGSS.718.0968:
Saffron, Celadon... I hear there are
many big cities in Kanto.
HGSS.718.0969:
Oh, no. I’ve lost something that’s
very important.\f
HGSS.718.0971:
I give up. You don’t have to look.
Just forget about it!
HGSS.718.0972: I’m going to Kanto to test my skills.\f
HGSS.718.0974:
Trainers from Johto can battle with
Kanto Gym Leaders.
HGSS.718.0975: I’m training to become the Champion!\f
HGSS.718.0977: I’m going to beat you someday!
HGSS.718.0978:
I’m trying to forget my woes.
Let’s battle!\f
HGSS.718.0980:
A voyage is best for getting over a
broken heart. But a Fast Ship trip is\r
too short for grieving.
HGSS.718.0981:
Ssh! My brain is picking up
radio signals!\f
HGSS.718.0983:
It seems that Johto’s radio shows
talk about Kanto when you are\r
in Kanto...
HGSS.718.0984:
What kinds of Poké Balls do you have
with you?\f
HGSS.718.0986:
You should use the right Poké Balls to
fit the situation.
HGSS.718.0987:
I’m building up my legs by bracing
against the ship’s rocking!\f
HGSS.718.0989:
I couldn’t find the Karate King in
Johto. He’s supposed to be training in a\r
cave somewhere.
HGSS.718.0990:
Even though we’re out on the sea,
I can’t fish! This is boring!\r
Let’s battle!\f
HGSS.718.0992: I plan to fish off Vermilion’s pier.
HGSS.718.0993: This is where we sailors work!\f
HGSS.718.0994: I lost on my home field...
HGSS.718.0995:
We get different passengers from
Vermilion City to Olivine City.
HGSS.718.0998:
I found a pretty coin here. 
Someone must have lost it...
HGSS.718.0999:
Do you know Mary?
She’s a popular DJ in Johto.\f
HGSS.718.1001:
Mary’s the best!
I want to be a DJ, too!
HGSS.718.1002:
I’m visiting my grandma to catch me
some bugs!\f
HGSS.718.1004:
I’ll catch all the Pokémon you can find
only in Johto!
HGSS.718.1005:
I’m going to audition my songs at
Goldenrod’s Radio Tower.\f
HGSS.718.1007:
Speaking of the Radio Tower, what is
Buena’s password for today?
HGSS.718.1008:
What do you think? My Pokémon are
beautiful, yes?\f
HGSS.718.1010:
I must take them to the Pokémon Salon
and get them fixed up nice!
HGSS.718.1011:
I’m going to shop at the Dept. Store
and then...\f
HGSS.718.1012: What was I going to do?
HGSS.718.1013:
Oh, yes! I have to get my Pokémon out
of Day Care!
HGSS.718.1014: Don’t lay a finger on my students!\f
HGSS.718.1016:
We’re on a school trip to the ruins
outside Violet.
HGSS.718.1017: Do you know the Ruins of Alph?\f
HGSS.718.1019:
Radios pick up strange signals inside
the ruins.
HGSS.718.1020:
There are some odd stone panels in the
Ruins of Alph.\f
HGSS.718.1022:
I read that there are four of those
stone panels.
HGSS.718.1023:
I’m a sailor man!\f
But I’m training Pokémon, so I can
become the Champion!\f
HGSS.718.1024: My lack of training is obvious...
HGSS.718.1025:
Those Badges you’re carrying...
Let me guess.\f
Those are the ones you get when you
defeat Gym Leaders, right?\f
That means you’re pretty strong!
HGSS.718.1026:
We stand guard in this tower.\f
Here, we express our gratitude to
show our respect for all Pokémon.\f
HGSS.718.1028:
All living beings coexist through
cooperation.\f
We must always be thankful for this.
HGSS.718.1029:
However hard we battle, the tower will
stand strong.\f
HGSS.718.1030: I fought hard, but I’m too weak.
HGSS.718.1031:
The flexible pillar protects the tower,
even from earthquakes.
HGSS.718.1032:
I train to find enlightenment
in Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.1033: This little squirt sure made me hurt!
HGSS.718.1034:
As Pokémon grow stronger, so does
the Trainer.\f
No, wait. As the Trainer grows
stronger, so do the Pokémon.
HGSS.718.1035:
Let me see how much you trust
your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.718.1037: It is not far to the Elder.
HGSS.718.1038: I sway like leaves in the wind...\f
HGSS.718.1040:
I tried to copy BELLSPROUT’s gentle
movements for battle...\f
But I didn’t train well enough.
HGSS.718.1041:
The Elder’s TM lights even
pitch-black darkness.\f
HGSS.718.1042: It is my head that is bright!
HGSS.718.1043: Let there be light on your journey.
HGSS.718.1044:
So good of you to come here!\f
Sprout Tower is a place of training.
People and Pokémon test their bonds\r
to build a bright future together.\r
I am the final test.\f
Allow me to check the ties between
you and your Pokémon!
HGSS.718.1046:
You and your Pokémon should have no
problem using this move.\f
Take this Flash TM.
HGSS.718.1047:
I’m practicing my fire breathing in the
Burned Tower! Don’t try this at home!\f
HGSS.718.1049:
Oops, please don’t misunderstand!
I’m not the reason that this tower is\r
burned up!
HGSS.718.1050:
Don’t worry!
We fire-breathers know the true power\r
of fire better than anyone!\f
HGSS.718.1051: Thanks for such a heated battle!
HGSS.718.1052:
The reason this tower’s burned is
that it was hit by lightning.\f
The fire I’m breathing is tiny
in comparison...
HGSS.718.1053:
We adore our Pokémon, even if they
dislike us. That’s what being a\r
Pokéfan is all about.\f
HGSS.718.1055:
I lost the battle, but my Pokémon win
the prize for being the most lovely.
HGSS.718.1056:
My Pokémon is simply darling.
Let me tell you how proud my\r
darling makes me.\f
HGSS.718.1057: I can beat you in pride, but...
HGSS.718.1058:
I must say, your Pokémon are quite
cute, too.
HGSS.718.1059:
I’ve been waiting here to brag to you
about my Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.1060:
Hello? Why are you staring at me?\f
Oh, a battle?\f
HGSS.718.1062:
I thought I did something wrong
because you kept staring at me.
HGSS.718.1063:
What?
Staring at people’s faces.\f
...Oh, didn’t I make a promise to
someone? Was that you?\f
HGSS.718.1064:
The world is deep. There are still lots
of things we don’t know.\r
But I know more than you do!\f
HGSS.718.1066:
There is a lot to learn.\f
For example...
There are more than 90 kinds of TMs.\r
And traded Pokémon level up faster.
HGSS.718.1067:
Yay!
You kept your promise and came back!\f
HGSS.718.1069:
Three years ago, Team Rocket was
forced to disband.\f
But we’re making a comeback here!\f
HGSS.718.1071:
We won’t let you ruin our plans for
our comeback!
HGSS.718.1072:
We’re Team Rocket!
We like to cause trouble!\f
Ooh! Are you scared?\f
HGSS.718.1074:
We’re not always evil. We just do
whatever we like.
HGSS.718.1075: Hey, hey! Keep out of our way!\f
HGSS.718.1077:
Our Executives are trying to take this
place over. They have some big plan.\r
I wonder what it is.
HGSS.718.1078:
Ha ha ha!\r
How boring. It was far too easy to take
over this place!\f
Come on, keep me amused!\f
HGSS.718.1080: You beat me, and I won’t forget it!
HGSS.718.1081:
An unknown child wandering here?
Who are you?\f
HGSS.718.1082: Tch! I took you too lightly!
HGSS.718.1083:
Bwahahaha...\f
I can transmit as strong a signal as
I need from here.
HGSS.718.1084:
I’ve been given strict orders.\f
I’m to crush anyone who challenges
Team Rocket!\f
HGSS.718.1086:
I failed in my duties...
I’ll be docked pay for this...
HGSS.718.1087:
It feels great ordering Pokémon to
commit crimes.\f
HGSS.718.1089:
I feel lousy over losing! Bah!
I hate useless Pokémon!
HGSS.718.1090:
Why did the door open? Did you have
something to do with this?\f
HGSS.718.1091: Gulp! This is a bleak moment.
HGSS.718.1092:
What?! You made it past our men in
the Underground? How could you have?
HGSS.718.1093:
Proton: Now, wait just one second!\f
Aren’t you the one who got in
our way at the SLOWPOKE Well?\f
I see... You’re doing all this because
you want to make me angry. Be careful!\f
But since you seem to wish it, I’ll show
you the full extent of a Team Rocket\r
Executive’s wrath!\f
HGSS.718.1094: Seriously, you’d chase me this far?!
HGSS.718.1097:
Proton: You may have won this time...
But all you did was make Team Rocket’s\r
wrath grow...
HGSS.718.1098:
Most excellent!\f
This Radio Tower will fulfill our
grand design.\f
HGSS.718.1099:
Hmmm...
All grand plans come with snags.
HGSS.718.1100:
Do you honestly believe you can stop
Team Rocket?
HGSS.718.1101:
You plan to rescue the Director?
So sad that won’t be possible--\r
because I’m going to beat you!\f
HGSS.718.1103: I do not believe it! I was beaten!
HGSS.718.1107: OK, OK. I’ll tell you where he is.
HGSS.718.1108:
Ariana: Hey, you...
Remember me from the hideout in\rMahogany Town?\fThis time...\fHee hee hee. This time...it looks like
you’re really all alone. All alone...\fSo it should be quite easy.
Bring it! Let’s finish this!\f
HGSS.718.1109: Hey, what do you think you’re doing?!
HGSS.718.1110: Wh... Wha... Why are you so strong?!
HGSS.718.1111:
Aaaieeeee!
This can’t be happening!\f
I fought hard, but I still lost...
HGSS.718.1112:
What a waste...
not to use your strength to do\r
bad things!\f
Feh... People like you will never in a
million years understand our brilliance!\f
It’s too bad... I’ve really come to
respect your strength.
HGSS.718.1113:
We can’t have you getting in the way
before news of our resurgence\r
reaches Giovanni!
HGSS.718.1116:
Hmmm...
This is a strange place.\f
HGSS.718.1119:
ZUBAT’s Supersonic keeps confusing my
Pokémon. I’m seriously upset\r
about that!\f
HGSS.718.1121:
I’ve practiced training my Pokémon,
but I’ve practiced breathing fire many\r
more times than that.\f
Don’t try this at home, OK?
HGSS.718.1122:
If there’s light, a cave isn’t scary. If
you’re strong, Pokémon aren’t scary.\f
HGSS.718.1124:
It’s my Pokémon’s fire that lights up
this cave.
HGSS.718.1125:
I roam far and wide in search of
Pokémon.\f
Are you looking for Pokémon, too?
Then you’re my collecting rival!\f
HGSS.718.1127:
Every Friday, you can hear Pokémon
roars from deep inside the cave.
HGSS.718.1128:
You’re headed to Azalea, are you?
Let my Pokémon see if you are good\r
enough to battle.\f
HGSS.718.1130:
All right, then! I’ve decided.\f
I’m not leaving until my Pokémon
get tougher!
HGSS.718.1131:
Whoa! What a surprise!
I didn’t expect to see anyone here!\f
HGSS.718.1133:
I was conned into buying a
SlowpokeTail. I feel sorry for the\r
poor Pokémon.
HGSS.718.1134:
Who’s there?
Leave me and my Pokémon alone!\f
HGSS.718.1136:
Just me and my Pokémon.
I’m delirious with joy.
HGSS.718.1137:
I came all the way here to conduct my
Pokémon research.\f
Let me demonstrate my findings in a
real battle!\f
HGSS.718.1138:
I’m the one who learned something from
your demonstration!
HGSS.718.1139:
I should compile and announce my study
findings. I might even become famous\r
like Professor Elm.
HGSS.718.1140:
It’s been a while since I last saw
another person.\f
Don’t be shy. Let’s battle!\f
HGSS.718.1142:
I’ve been lost for a long time...\f
I don’t mind it here, but I am
soooo hungry!
HGSS.718.1143:
What do you know!
A visitor!\f
HGSS.718.1144: Wa ha ha! You’re a feisty one!
HGSS.718.1145:
I live down here.
If you like, you can always come visit!
HGSS.718.1146:
There are two kinds of people:
those with style and those without.\f
Which kind of person are you?\f
HGSS.718.1148:
Your Pokémon style is stunning and
full of life, I admit.\f
You’ll just keep getting better!
HGSS.718.1149:
I’m in training.
Care for a round?\f
HGSS.718.1150: Aww, no! You’re too good for me.
HGSS.718.1151:
I’m going to train by myself until
I improve.
HGSS.718.1152:
If the Pokémon I liked were there,
I’d go anywhere.\f
That’s what a real Trainer does.\f
HGSS.718.1153: I’d rather pet my Pokémon than battle!
HGSS.718.1154:
Just once a week, a Pokémon comes to
the water’s edge.\f
I wanted to see that Pokémon...
HGSS.718.1155:
It doesn’t matter where we go, there’s
always someone who doesn’t agree\r
with us...
HGSS.718.1156:
Are you serious? Did you come here
thinking you could mess with our plans?
HGSS.718.1157:
Grr...
For a kid to be this good...\r
I didn’t see it coming.
HGSS.718.1158:
Quit taking SlowpokeTails?\f
If we listened to you, Team Rocket’s
rep would be ruined!\f
HGSS.718.1160:
We need the money, but selling
SlowpokeTails?\f
It’s tough being a Team Rocket Grunt!
HGSS.718.1161:
Humph! I was standing guard up top
when some old coot yelled at me.\f
He startled me so much that I fell
down here.\f
How about I vent my anger and take it
out on you!\f
HGSS.718.1162: Arrgh! This is NOT my day!
HGSS.718.1163:
Sure, we’ve been hacking the tails off
SLOWPOKE and selling them.\f
Team Rocket will do anything for money!
HGSS.718.1164:
Stop taking SlowpokeTails?\f
What?! You want us to disobey a direct
order from Executive Proton?\f
If you want to stop us, you’ll have to
defeat us all! Go ahead and try!\f
HGSS.718.1166:
SlowpokeTails grow back fast!\f
Besides, it was an order from Proton,
so I’m more concerned about that!
HGSS.718.1167:
What are you here for? Just to stand
around and gawk? I suggest you leave!\f
HGSS.718.1169:
How in the world do you go up?\f
I want to visit the sick Pokémon, but I
can’t get up there...
HGSS.718.1170:
We’re pretty high up here. My bird
Pokémon are in prime form.\f
HGSS.718.1172:
My bird Pokémon trained in Cianwood.
Since I’ve lost, maybe we’ll go across\r
the sea.
HGSS.718.1173:
I travel the world to train my Pokémon.
Now, I wish to battle with you.\f
HGSS.718.1175:
Jasmine used to use Rock Pokémon
like ONIX.
HGSS.718.1176: Eh? This is no place for playing.\f
HGSS.718.1177: Ah! I can see you’re serious.
HGSS.718.1178:
Up top is a Pokémon that keeps the
Lighthouse lit.\f
Pokémon glow when they are healthy,
just like people.
HGSS.718.1180:
Jasmine is this city’s Gym Leader.
I intend to bring her back with me.\f
Nobody better get in my way!\f
HGSS.718.1182:
Right. Anybody would be worried if his or
her own Pokémon were hurt.
HGSS.718.1183:
Men of the sea are always spoiling for a
good fight!\f
HGSS.718.1185:
What power! How would you like to sail
the seas with me?
HGSS.718.1186:
Hey, you’re back!
Just in time for me to show off!\f
HGSS.718.1187:
Sailors are both kind and strong.
How about you?\f
HGSS.718.1188: You are both kind and strong...
HGSS.718.1189:
Every time I come back to Olivine,
I visit the Gym.\f
The Gym Leader’s Pokémon type
changed without my noticing.
HGSS.718.1190:
Jasmine must be worried sick about the
Pokémon here. She won’t even smile\r
these days.\f
HGSS.718.1191: I can’t manage a smile, either...
HGSS.718.1192:
Speaking of being sick, I’ve heard
there’s a good Pharmacy in Cianwood.
HGSS.718.1193:
I wanted to battle Jasmine, but she’s
not up to it now. So how about you?\f
HGSS.718.1195:
Being a Gym Leader isn’t just about
being strong. A Leader also needs to\r
be compassionate.
HGSS.718.1196:
This was once a ninja hideout.\f
There are traps to confound intruders
like you.\f
HGSS.718.1198:
The PC on my desk is the switch
that deactivates the PERSIAN\r
alarm system.\f
Don’t you ever touch it, OK?
HGSS.718.1199:
Heh heh. Feeling lucky, punk?\f
Go ahead, take another step.
We’ve got explosives set in the floor!\r
Step on one, and--BOOM!\f
HGSS.718.1201:
Where are the traps planted?
That... Well...\f
I don’t even remember!
HGSS.718.1203:
Surveillance cams are in the
Pokémon statues.\f
We’ll keep appearing until you trip a
secret switch.
HGSS.718.1206:
Tch, you really are strong.\f
It’s too bad. If you were to join Team
Rocket, you could become an Executive.
HGSS.718.1207:
The door won’t open?\f
Well, duh. It has to have a password
that only Team Rocket knows.\f
HGSS.718.1209:
Heh, I’m just a Team Rocket Grunt.
I don’t know the password.\r
Too bad for you.
HGSS.718.1210:
Oh, a kid? I don’t really like this, but
eliminate you I must.\f
HGSS.718.1212:
I got wiped out on the last mission by a
kid, too. When we were abducting\r
Pokémon, this kid with long red hair and\r
mean-looking eyes just whomped me...
HGSS.718.1215:
Heh, only the one who guards the boss’s
room knows the password for that door.\f
Where’s the boss’s room?
Who knows? Go look for yourself.
HGSS.718.1219:
I...I couldn’t do a thing...
Giovanni, please forgive me...
HGSS.718.1220:
I used to work for Silph, but now I run
research for Team Rocket.\f
A meddlesome child like you needs to be
punished.\f
HGSS.718.1221: A mere tactical error cost me...
HGSS.718.1222:
A radio signal that drives Pokémon
mad... My experiment is a complete\r
success. My promotion is assured.\r
This loss means absolutely nothing.
HGSS.718.1223:
I don’t care that Pokémon are hurt by
our experiment.\f
HGSS.718.1224: Thinking is my strong suit, not battling.
HGSS.718.1225:
If we turn up the power of our radio
signal for broadcast nationwide...\f
The very thought excites me!
HGSS.718.1226:
Hyuck-hyuck-hyuck!\f
You’re challenging me to a battle?
Hah! You’re nuts, but you have guts!\f
I like that! If you can beat me, I’ll
tell you a password to the boss’s room!\f
HGSS.718.1227:
The password for the boss’s door--\f
RATICATETAIL.
HGSS.718.1228:
The password for the boss’s door--
RATICATETAIL.\f
But if you don’t have both passwords...
Ha ha ha!
HGSS.718.1229:
Do I know the password?\f
Maybe.\f
But no weakling’s going to get it!\f
HGSS.718.1230:
The password for the boss’s door--\f
SLOWPOKETAIL.
HGSS.718.1231:
The password to the boss’s room is
SLOWPOKETAIL.\f
But it’s useless unless you have two
passwords.
HGSS.718.1232:
My Pokémon just got a haircut!
I’ll show you how strong it is!\f
HGSS.718.1234:
Your Pokémon will like you more if you
give them haircuts.
HGSS.718.1235:
I think you have some rare Pokémon
with you. Let me see them!\f
HGSS.718.1236:
Gah! I lost!
That makes me mad!
HGSS.718.1237:
Are you making a Pokédex?
Here’s a hot tip.\f
You want to battle as many Trainers as
you can when you see them on routes\r
and in caves.\f
Their Pokémon will be recorded in the
Pokédex, and they’ll also make your\r
Pokémon grow!
HGSS.718.1238:
I got booted out of the Game Corner.
I kept winning at the new Coin game,\r
and they thought I was cheating...\f
HGSS.718.1240:
I guess I have to do things fair
and square...
HGSS.718.1241:
Do you consider the Pokémon types
in battle?\f
If you know about the different types
of Pokémon, you’ll do better in battle.\f
HGSS.718.1243:
I know all the different types
of Pokémon.\r
But I only use one type.
HGSS.718.1246:
Steal and sell!
That’s basic in crime, kid!
HGSS.718.1247:
They ditched this project before
they finished.\r
I’m searching for leftover loot.\f
HGSS.718.1249:
The underground warehouse?\f
What do you want to go there for?
There’s nothing down there.
HGSS.718.1250:
Open one door, another closes. Bet you
can’t get where you want to go!\f
HGSS.718.1251: Uh-oh! I was sunk by indecision!
HGSS.718.1252:
I’m confused, too...\f
I’m pretty sure that the green switch
is the one to press last... I think?
HGSS.718.1253:
I don’t care if you’re lost. You show up
here--you’re nothing but a victim!\f
HGSS.718.1254: Urk! Yeah, think you’re cool, huh?
HGSS.718.1255:
You must have ice in your veins to
call out Team Rocket.
HGSS.718.1256:
Kwa ha ha!\f
Confounded by the doors, are we?\f
I’ll let you in on a secret if you can
beat me!\f
HGSS.718.1258:
All right. A hint!\f
Look at the color of the door switches.
You push a color switch, and the same\r
color door opens up...
HGSS.718.1259:
Are you lost? No, you can’t be.
You don’t have that scared look. I’ll\r
give you something to be scared about!\f
HGSS.718.1261:
Go wherever you like! Get lost!
See if I care!
HGSS.718.1262:
You’re not going any farther!
I don’t show mercy to my enemies,\r
especially not brats!\f
HGSS.718.1264:
I lost...\f
Please forgive me, Giovanni!
HGSS.718.1265:
Hyuck-hyuck-hyuck!
I remember you!\f
You got me good at our hideout!\f
HGSS.718.1266:
Hyuck-hyuck-hyuck!
So that’s how you did it!
HGSS.718.1268:
How did you get this far? I guess it
can’t be helped. I’ll dispose of you.\f
HGSS.718.1270:
Team Rocket will keep going, waiting for
the return of Giovanni.\f
We’ll do whatever it takes.
HGSS.718.1272: You! How dare you enter uninvited!\f
HGSS.718.1274:
The Shrine ahead is home to the Master
of our Dragon Tamer clan.\f
You’re not allowed to just go in!
HGSS.718.1277:
Soon I’m going to get permission from
our Master to use dragons.\f
When I do, I’m going to become an
admirable Dragon Tamer and gain our\r
Master’s approval.
HGSS.718.1278:
It’s a stranger--someone we
don’t know.\f
HGSS.718.1280: It was like having to battle Lance.
HGSS.718.1281:
We fight as a team. Come back later with
more Pokémon.
HGSS.718.1284:
We’ll tell on you.\f
Master will be angry with you.
HGSS.718.1285:
You don’t have enough Pokémon.
Come back when you have more.
HGSS.718.1288:
Welcome to Viridian Forest.
Enjoy my Bug-type Pokémon!\f
HGSS.718.1290:
Pretty impressive!\f
I’m sure you can go anywhere with
that skill!
HGSS.718.1291:
Shh! Be quiet!
The bug Pokémon will run away!\f
HGSS.718.1293:
From Bug-type Pokémon come the sounds
of munching on grass, walking on\r
crunchy leaves, swimming in puddles...\f
For bug Pokémon fans, knowing how to
distinguish these sounds is key!
HGSS.718.1294:
Wow, that’s a HUGE Pokémon!\f
...
...What kind of Trainer?!\f
HGSS.718.1296:
Has anyone ever told you that from
behind you look like a VENONAT?
HGSS.718.1297:
I’m sure that there’s nothing more
efficient and beautiful in this world\r
than a Bug-type Pokémon.\f
HGSS.718.1299: If this is it, then I don’t mind losing!
HGSS.718.1300:
There are many people out there who
prefer solid bug Pokémon over squishy\r
bug Pokémon.\f
HGSS.718.1301:
Thanks for your hard work,
my lovely Pokémon...
HGSS.718.1302:
Doesn’t matter what kind of Pokémon--\r
as long as you like them, they all
look cute.
HGSS.718.1303:
What did you come all the way out here
for, I wonder.\f
HGSS.718.1304: I lost all the way out here...
HGSS.718.1306:
Hey, hey, you’re in my way!
Right!\f
HGSS.718.1309:
To beat the cold, try warm clothes and
a hot drink!\f
HGSS.718.1310: Argh, all the way out here!
HGSS.718.1312:
How do I feel about losing?
It hurts!
HGSS.718.1315: It’s pure white in my head!
HGSS.718.1316: Argh... I can’t do any more...
HGSS.718.1318:
You!
I’ve been waiting for someone like you!\f
HGSS.718.1319: Yep, just as strong as expected!
HGSS.718.1320:
That was a great fight!
Don’t you agree?
HGSS.718.1321:
Right after learning it in class, I head
outside to practice!\f
HGSS.718.1322: I need to follow the textbook.
HGSS.718.1323:
I should be sure to record all of
today’s mistakes in a notebook!
HGSS.718.1324:
My Bag is digging into my shoulders!
When that happens, I like to take a\r
break and have a battle!\f
HGSS.718.1326:
All right, guess I should carry my
Bag again!
HGSS.718.1327:
How about you just slow down
and give me the chance to defeat you!\f
HGSS.718.1328:
Looks like I’ve been beaten at my
own game...
HGSS.718.1329:
Even though you’re so young, you
have the spirit of battle within.\f
You must have trained under a
well-known master!
HGSS.718.1330:
Zac: Really, you want to battle us?
You’ve got a lot of courage for someone\r
so young.\f
HGSS.718.1333:
Zac: You... Please come back with
more Pokémon.
HGSS.718.1334:
Jen: Huh? You’d like to go up against
us? Great!\f
HGSS.718.1335:
Jen: You’re so much stronger than
I thought.
HGSS.718.1336:
Jen: I’m looking forward to seeing what
kind of Trainer you’ll become.
HGSS.718.1337:
Jen: If you’re looking to battle us,
you have to have at least two Pokémon.
HGSS.718.1338: Wait a moment! Come fight us!\f
HGSS.718.1340:
You came all the way from Johto?
You must be very persistent!
HGSS.718.1341:
Peace!\f
...
...Huh?\f
When you meet the unknown on a
mountain road, all you want is peace,\r
right?\f
HGSS.718.1343:
Exchanging lighthearted greetings with
someone you don’t know...\f
That’s the best thing about mountains!
HGSS.718.1344:
Youngster? Goodness, how rude!
Call me Shorts Boy!\f
HGSS.718.1346: Looks like I need a bit more training!
HGSS.718.1347:
Moe: Do I look weak?
Don’t make me laugh!\r
When I’m with Lulu, I’ve got a hundred\r
times more courage!\f
HGSS.718.1349:
Moe: In short, you’re just
too strong...
HGSS.718.1350:
Moe: You don’t have enough Pokémon to
fight with us.
HGSS.718.1351:
Lulu: Moe and I make a great pair! You
should prepare yourself!\f
HGSS.718.1353:
Lulu: Don’t you misunderstand this!
It’s not that Moe’s weak, it’s that\r
you’re too strong!
HGSS.718.1354:
Lulu: Uh-oh, you’ve got only one
Pokémon. You can’t battle with us\r
like that!
HGSS.718.1355:
I am but a Gentleman stopped on the
road. Would you care to join me in a\r
quick contest?\f
HGSS.718.1357:
Stopping in the road for a battle isn’t
rude. No matter what, I am a\r
Gentleman first!
HGSS.718.1358: Huh? The wind has changed direction!\f
HGSS.718.1360:
Since the wind has changed,
I’ll lay low...
HGSS.718.1364:
Vic: All right! I’ll be able to show off
for Tara!\f
HGSS.718.1366:
Vic: Tara’s already seen
me humiliated...
HGSS.718.1367:
Vic: What is it? You want to battle?
If you want to battle with us, you need\r
more Pokémon, right?
HGSS.718.1368:
Tara: I love to look at my boyfriend’s
face in profile while he’s battling!\f
HGSS.718.1370:
Tara: Even though my boyfriend lost,
he’s still wonderful.
HGSS.718.1371:
Tara: Oh? You’ve got only one Pokémon?
OK, we’ll try again another time.
HGSS.718.1374:
Really? Rather than always catching new
Pokémon, it’s good to train them?
HGSS.718.1375:
It was nice talking to you, but now I’m
here for a Pokémon battle!\f
HGSS.718.1376:
Tim: I’ll give you a little hint.\f
Don’t you think my girlfriend’s much
stronger than I am?\f
HGSS.718.1378:
Tim: If you’ve beaten her, you must
be strong!
HGSS.718.1379:
Tim: Are you collecting Pokémon? You
can’t fight us with just one Pokémon.
HGSS.718.1380:
Tim: Hey, you came back! 
While we were waiting for you, we became\r
much stronger!\f
Well, she did.\f
HGSS.718.1381:
Sue: Women who don’t take love
seriously and who are reckless might\r
get hurt.\f
HGSS.718.1383:
Sue: That strength of yours...\f
I’ve got it! Are you in love?
HGSS.718.1384:
Sue: Let’s have a Pokémon battle after
you’ve gotten more than one Pokémon.
HGSS.718.1385:
Sue: A woman in love is impatient.\f
But if she’s with her boyfriend,
waiting is never a chore!\f
HGSS.718.1386:
Collect water!
Don’t let the fire go out!\r
Look out for wild Pokémon!\r
Let’s go, Campfire!\f
HGSS.718.1388:
It doesn’t matter what kind of
preparation you’ve done.\r
If you lose, you lose.
HGSS.718.1389:
I can fit in a quick battle while I’m in
the midst of preparing a meal!\f
HGSS.718.1391:
I figured it would be easy to knock
you out...
HGSS.718.1392:
Hey, you’re back! I haven’t eaten
anything while I waited!\f
HGSS.718.1393:
Hey, hey, how about we bring out your
Pokémon and mine for a battle?\f
HGSS.718.1395:
The way you were walking with your
Pokémon made me think that I could win.
HGSS.718.1396:
Why is it I always get the urge to
whistle when walking through nature?\f
HGSS.718.1398:
Instead of communicating with Pokémon
with words, you can communicate with\r
them through whistling!
HGSS.718.1399:
All right, let’s get this Pokémon
battle started!\f
HGSS.718.1400:
All right!
That concludes today’s battle.
HGSS.718.1401:
Don’t relax just ’cause you won.
Once you get home, you should do a\r
full review!
HGSS.718.1402:
My weight puts me in the
featherweight class!\f
...Huh? What do you mean that
doesn’t sound very strong?\f
HGSS.718.1403: I lost as lightly as a feather floats!
HGSS.718.1404:
Maybe I should lie and say I’m in the
heavyweight class...
HGSS.718.1405:
I’m a stubborn featherweight.
I’ve been waiting here for you!\f
HGSS.718.1406:
I can’t wait to go home and drop off
my Bag!\f
HGSS.718.1407: I was in too much of a hurry.
HGSS.718.1408:
Don’t rush, and take the road one step
at a time. Great advice!
HGSS.718.1409:
It’s good to put what you learn to
use immediately!\f
HGSS.718.1411:
All right!
Next time, I won’t make any mistakes!
HGSS.718.1412:
I’ve made good use of the time I’ve
been waiting and done a review!\f
HGSS.718.1413:
Do you have after-school
study sessions?\f
HGSS.718.1415:
Maybe I should join your
study sessions!
HGSS.718.1416:
We’re the twins Kay and Tia!
Do you know which one I am?\f
HGSS.718.1419:
If you want to battle with us,
you’ll need to bring more Pokémon!
HGSS.718.1420:
While you weren’t looking, Kay and Tia
changed places.\f
HGSS.718.1421:
We’re the twins Kay and Tia!
Do you know which one I am?\f
HGSS.718.1424:
If you want to battle with us,
you’ll need to bring more Pokémon!
HGSS.718.1425:
While you weren’t looking, Tia and Kay
changed places.\f
HGSS.718.1426:
Hey, your Pokémon...
Show me. Show me. Show me!\f
HGSS.718.1428:
When you battle Pokémon, you get to
see a bunch of Pokémon you’ve never\r
seen before. It’s so great!
HGSS.718.1429: All right, Pokémon, time for a battle!\f
HGSS.718.1431:
It’s not that my Pokémon are weak!
It’s that your Pokémon are too strong!
HGSS.718.1432:
You’re gonna lose!
I’ve got a hunch!\f
HGSS.718.1433: Maybe my hunch was a little off...
HGSS.718.1434:
You’re so cool!
You don’t do anything halfway!
HGSS.718.1435:
Modding my Bike costs a bunch of money!
I need a job!\f
HGSS.718.1437:
Bike?
Oh, I was talking about my Bicycle!
HGSS.718.1438:
